projects.title: Fact Arena
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack AI-Judged 1v1 Debate Platform (Argument Settler)
projects.description: Fact Arena turns debates into a competitive game. Two players sit on the same device, take turns entering arguments under a time limit, and at the end, arguments are evaluated and winner is decided.Instead of just 'who talks more,' the system focuses on who argues better with facts.
features: Two-player, single-device pass-and-play debate format
Timed rounds with players alternating arguments
Custom, user-selected debate topics
Full transcript sent to an impartial AI judge (Groq LLM) for evaluation
AI scoring based on logical consistency, topic relevance, argument strength, persuasiveness, and quality of counterpoints
Structured judgment output: individual scores, final winner, and detailed reasoning
React (Vite) + Tailwind CSS frontend
Node.js + Express.js backend

projects.title: Island Rain
projects.subtitle: A 3D island escape puzzle built with Three.js for Reddit's Devvit Web.
projects.description: A daily 3D word-puzzle game for Reddit, built on the Devvit developer platform. Rain letters onto a low-poly island, catch the ones you need, and unscramble the hidden word before the rising flood swallows your beach. Each day a new puzzle is posted to the community. Players race the clock, climb time and score-based leaderboards, and share their results back to the comments.
features: Daily 3D word-puzzle game built on Reddit's Devvit platform
New puzzle posted automatically each day, shared by the whole community
Collect phase: tap falling letters for points, avoid decoy letters that cost score and add a time penalty
Unscramble phase: drag collected tiles into the correct order
Escape phase: solve the word before the rising flood, earning escape and speed bonuses
Daily hook: failing a puzzle lets you suggest the next day's puzzle
Daily challenge mode with live, time and score-based leaderboards and Archive mode to replay past puzzles for unranked practice
Automated post creation via cron scheduling, app install, and moderator menu action
Redis-backed leaderboards tracking fastest times and highest scores per day
Result sharing: winners can post their run as a comment on the puzzle thread

projects.title: Linracy
projects.subtitle: Social Media Platform
projects.description: Linracy is a Full Stack social media website designed with a focus on clean UI and seamless user experience. It allows users to sign up, create and manage their profiles, and explore other users, along with uploading and browsing photos — all within a responsive and sleek interface. The project demonstrates core concepts of full-stack development using the MERN stack.
features: User Authentication: Secure registration and login system
Photo Uploads: Users can upload and display images
Profile Management: Personalized profile pages with dynamic data
Explore Users: Discover and view other user profiles
Responsive UI: Responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

projects.title: O3Scope
projects.subtitle: Ozone Analysis, Visualization and Prediction Using Nasa Dataset
projects.description: The depletion of the ozone layer is one of the most pressing environmental challenges of our time, directly affecting UV exposure, human health, and global ecosystems. O3Scope was built to make this invisible crisis visible: transforming raw NASA satellite data into interactive maps, city-level risk classifications, and predictive forecasts that anyone can explore.
features: User Authentication: Secure registration and login system
Photo Uploads: Users can upload and display images
Profile Management: Personalized profile pages with dynamic data
Explore Users: Discover and view other user profiles
Responsive UI: Responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

projects.title: Hangul Path
projects.subtitle: MERN Korean language learning platform
projects.description: A full-stack MERN Korean language learning platform | A structured path from Hangul basics to everyday conversation. One lesson unlocks each day | Read, practice, and quiz your way to fluency.
features: Webtoon-style lessons presented as comic panel sequences with paper texture, not plain text
Daily unlock system - one lesson unlocks per day to encourage consistent practice over binge-cramming
Quizzes per lesson to test understanding before moving forward
AI tutor available to ask questions and get help anytime during the course
Progress tracking with visual summary of completed days and quiz scores
Reset anytime - restart the full 30-day course from Day 1 for a clean slate
